title: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Online Form 2026
organization: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET
short_info: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 29/04/2026 to 02/06/2026.candidates should read the UPGET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPGET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, GNM Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply. Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, Uttar Pradesh Uttar Pradesh UP GNM Entrance Test 2026 (UPGET 2026) ABVMU UPGET 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS: 3000/- SC / ST / PH : 2000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only. UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET

tables.table_name: UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2026 Minimum Age : 17 Years. Maximum Age : NA Age Relaxation Extra as per ABVMU, Lucknow UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Admissions Rules.
rows: UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Eligibility
10+2 Intermediate with English 40% Marks. 10+2 Intermediate with English 40% Marks in Vocational ANM Course. Registered ANM with Passing Marks. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
